arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand weighs in on Roy Keane's fierce criticism of Man United captain Bruno Fernandes with 'poisonous tongue' comment
arts.sum: Roy Keane delivered an explosive tirade on Bruno Fernandes ahead of Manchester United's 3-0 win over Leicester on Sunday, claiming he lacked leadership skills at Old Trafford.
